testcase.name: Matching filter sequence test
testcase.description: Tests of unit matching filters against sequences where matchAny='true'. Assumes that non-sequential matching works as these tests only check sequence behaviour.

variation.name: Unit sequence match test. Three single facts of eg:a with units that each match one of three facts eg:b contained in a sequence
variation.description: Expecected result is 3 output facts, as each input fact unit will always match against a unit in the sequence

variation.name: Unit sequence complement match test. Three single facts of eg:a, one of which has a unit that does not match any facts in a sequence
variation.description: Expecected result is 2 output facts, where each fact unit matches against a unit in the sequence

variation.name: Unit sequence complement match test. Three single facts of eg:a, one of which has a unit that does not match any facts in a sequence
variation.description: As previous case but with complementing match filter. Produces 1 output fact for the fact that does not match, due to the matching filter being complemented
